nasb.text: and to bring the silver and gold, which the king and his counselors have freely offered to the God of Israel, whose dwelling is in Jerusalem,

esv.text: and also to carry the silver and gold that the king and his counselors have freely offered to the God of Israel, whose dwelling is in Jerusalem,

cnv.text: 你要把王和他顧問甘心獻的金銀帶去，奉獻給住在耶路撒冷之以色列的　神；

ccb.text: 并带去我和谋士们自愿献的金银，献给住在耶路撒冷的以色列的上帝，
